channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: HP's huge Memorial Day sale is already live — I've looked through everything and these are easily the 6 best laptop deals
item.description: On the hunt for a new laptop? You don't even have to wait until Memorial Day to score a deal at the official HP Store.

item.title: It’s not the fastest but NordVPN is my top choice for streaming soccer on Peacock TV – best of all, it’s still on sale
item.description: Don't forget to look at latency when you're choosing a VPN for streaming or gaming – speed is nothing without consistency.

item.title: Amazon dévoile la première Kindle Scribe couleur
item.description: Amazon lance une nouvelle gamme de Kindle Scribe comprenant trois modèles, dont le premier Kindle Scribe couleur. Dans la foulée, l'entreprise annonce aussi de nouvelles fonctionnalités.

item.title: What's new at Lego for June: 16 fresh sets to swoon over, including a soccer legend, an iconic city skyline, and the working road bike everyone's been waiting for
item.description: This summer is bringing with it more brick-based brilliance.

item.title: Android Show 2026 live — all the big news on Android 17 and more
item.description: All the latest news from Google's Android-focused pre-I/O show, as it happens.

item.title: Sam Altman takes the stand in trial against Elon Musk
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has begun his testimony against Elon Musk in a high-profile jury trial in a California federal courtroom. Altman, alongside OpenAI president Greg Brockman, is a primary defendant in the trial brought by Musk. Altman, Brockman, and Musk were all part of the initial founding team at OpenAI, with Musk investing up […]

item.title: Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power returns to Prime Video in November
item.description: Season three of Amazon's Lord of the Rings show skips forward several years from the second season finale.

item.title: OpenAI snaps up consulting company to help spread the word about AI
item.description: OpenAI sets out plans to embed DeployCo workers inside customer enterprises to help them identify AI uses cases and transformation opportunities.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus passe pour la première fois à 699 euros chez Orange, sans forfait
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus fait partie des derniers smartphones haut de gamme lancés par le géant sud-coréen. Il peut actuellement vous revenir à 699 euros au lieu de 1 269 euros chez Orange. Et oui, le S26 est proposé au même prix.

item.title: George Clooney, Tom Hanks, and Meryl Streep back new ‘Human Consent Standard’ for AI licensing
item.description: Hollywood actors and producers are standing behind a new AI licensing standard that will tell AI systems whether they'll need to pay to use a person's likeness, creative work, characters, and designs. With the Human Consent Standard, people can set terms for the use of their work or likeness, including giving AI systems full permission […]

item.title: Panasonic just brought back an iconic series of premium compact cameras back from the dead and put its most powerful sensor and processor inside — meet the new Lumix L10, a stellar everyday camera
item.description: With its iconic compact design, versatile Leica zoom lens, plus Panasonic's latest sensor and processor — the Lumix L10 has all the ingredients to be a hit

item.title: Lumix L10 : Panasonic ressuscite le compact expert avec un capteur de G9 II et un zoom Leica ultra-lumineux
item.description: Panasonic bouscule le marché des compacts experts avec son nouveau Lumix L10. Alliant un capteur 4/3 de 20,4 mégapixels à une optique Leica 24-75 mm ultra-lumineuse, ce boîtier veut détrôner les ténors du secteur.

item.title: Running Claude Code or Claude in Chrome? Here's the audit matrix for every blind spot your security stack misses
item.description: Between May 6 and 7, four security research teams published findings about Anthropic’s Claude that most outlets covered as three separate stories. One involved a water utility in Mexico, another targeted a Chrome extension, and a third hijacked OAuth tokens through Claude Code. In one case, Claude identified a water utility’s SCADA gateway without being told to look for one.These are not three bugs. They are one architectural question playing out on three surfaces. No single patch released so far addresses all of them.The common thread is the confused deputy, a trust-boundary failure where a p...

item.title: Trump Media Scales Back Plans for Its Own Prediction Market
item.description: Truth Predict was supposed to be the Trump family’s biggest leap yet into prediction markets. Now it’s looking more like a tiptoe.

item.title: Rivian’s AI-powered voice assistant is ready to roll
item.description: Rivian's AI-powered voice assistant is rolling out today to the company's vehicle fleet. The assistant will be available through a software update to all compatible Rivian Gen 1 and Gen 2 vehicle owners who subscribe to the company's Connect Plus cellular service, which costs $15 a month or $150 a year, or are in an […]

item.title: Un casque gaming sans fil à près de 100 euros ? C’est possible avec cette réduction sur le Corsair Void V2 [Sponso]
item.description: Pour tout gamer qui se respecte, avoir un bon casque audio est nécessaire pour profiter au mieux des sessions de jeu. Amazon propose en ce moment le casque audio Bluetooth Corsair Void V2 à -14 % en passant à 103 euros dans sa version blanche ! Spatialisation Dolby Atmos, autonomie jusqu'à 70 heures, double connectivité 2,4 GHz & Bluetooth, voici quelques-unes des promesses de ce casque parfait pour vos soirées gaming. ...

item.title: JBL just refreshed its touchscreen-equipped earbud line with better sound, ANC, and call quality — here’s everything you need to know
item.description: JBL is refreshing its touchscreen-equipped earbuds with the new JBL Live 4 series.

item.title: Jeux mystères d’Epic : on croit déjà connaître le nom des deux premiers jeux gratuits
item.description: C’est désormais une tradition. Pour accompagner ses Mega Soldes de mai 2026, l’Epic Games Store relance ses jeux mystères et des théories tournent déjà.

item.title: Discord Nitro is actually worth it now, and it's all thanks to this new partnership with Xbox
item.description: Discord has been under fire over the last few months over the age verification controversy, but that may simmer down after its latest collaboration.

item.title: 'Current LLMs introduce substantial errors when editing work documents': Microsoft scientists find most AI models struggle with long-running tasks — so maybe don't trust them completely just yet
item.description: The more interactions an AI model has, the less reliable it becomes, experts find, as even the best only scored 80.9% – and the worst scoring just 10.0%.

item.title: Digg is back (again), this time as an AI news aggregator
item.description: After a failed relaunch earlier this year, Digg has returned with a stripped-down new approach focused on surfacing the most important stories and voices in artificial intelligence. When the history of the internet is written, the story of Digg might be one of its most fascinating chapters.

item.title: All Your Hantavirus Questions, Answered by an Infectious Disease Expert
item.description: Here’s what you need to know, from why the cruise ship outbreak won’t spark the next pandemic to how hantavirus spreads.

item.title: The beginner and budget-friendly Acer Nitro V 15 gaming laptop is $100 cheaper than usual
item.description: The beginner-friendly 2025 Acer Nitro V 15 gaming laptop is on sale at Amazon for only $699.99, which is $100 off its list price.

item.title: Upfront 2026: Amazon is doubling down on YA content with a ‘Fourth Wing’ series. Advertisers are preparing to feast
item.description: According to sales execs, Amazon has already penetrated 90% of U.S. households. Next up is an adaptation of Rebecca Yarros’ best-selling novel. Amazon can deliver anything—including, increasingly, eyeballs to advertisers. And now, its upcoming slate of content, including an adaptation of the best-selling novel Fourth Wing and a list of young adult content, is sure to have advertisers excited....

item.title: Alan Wake comes to horror game Phasmophobia
item.description: This is a free update on all platforms.

item.title: How to watch Eurovision Song Contest 2026 semi-final 1 — Free Streams, Release Date & TV Schedule
item.description: 15 countries go head-to-head in the first semi-final of Eurovision Song Contest 2026 as Vienna plays host to the popular musical competition.

item.title: Anker’s fast, foldable 3-in-1 charging station is back to its best price yet
item.description: Anker’s Prime Wireless Charging Station is a small, yet powerful 3-in-1 charger that can charge your iPhone, Apple Watch, and earbuds simultaneously, and now it’s on sale for $104.99 ($45 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. The price has only dropped this low one other time since it launched in February. There are a […]

item.title: Musk warns Sam Altman will be one of America’s ‘most hated’ men as the OpenAI trial continues
item.description: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is seeking to unseat Sam Altman from OpenAI’s leadership for a second time. In a trial featuring a clash between Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, neither of the tech titans has emerged as an overly sympathetic character. But nobody has more to lose than Altman, who is expected to take the stand this week to defend himself.Already, testimony about Altman’s turbulent tenure at the ChatGPT maker has become prime fodder for internet jokes. One piece of evidence that has inspired countless memes was a text exchange between Altman and a company officer, Mira Murati, in 2023 d...

item.title: Free Mobile : deux petites nouveautés pour ceux qui aiment changer d’opérateur
item.description: Free accélère les procédures d'inscription. Il sera beaucoup plus rapide de faire porter son numéro de téléphone mobile vers Free Mobile. Espérons que les autres opérateurs s'en inspirent vite.

item.title: Les jeux services n’ont plus la cote ? Sega abandonne son « Super Game »
item.description: Environ 5 ans après son annonce, Sega décide d'annuler son projet « Super Game », un jeu service qui devait rapporter gros à l'entreprise.

item.title: Save over $2,500 while the Anker Solix F3800 Plus is on a major discount at Amazon
item.description: The Anker Solix F3800 Plus is on sale at Amazon for $2,294.99, down from the list price at Anker of $4,799. That's a 52% discount.

item.title: Exaforce raises $125M Series B to build AI for catching and stopping cyberattacks as they happen
item.description: The round valued the three-year-old startup at $725 million.

item.title: Gemini : Google déploie une fonction « entourer » sur Android pour simplifier vos recherches
item.description: Google est en train de déployer sur Android une nouvelle fonction de recherche destinée à la superposition Gemini. Cette dernière permet, tout bêtement, d'entourer du contenu affiché à l'écran de façon à interroger l'IA à ce propos.

item.title: From MSN to Windows, test your Microsoft knowledge in this 15-question quiz — no Copilot allowed
item.description: Think you know Microsoft’s hardware and software? Take this 15-question quiz on Windows, Xbox, MSN and more.

item.title: Fatal Fury publisher SNK announces VS Studio, a new development team founded by Tekken creator Katsuhiro Harada — 'VS Studio's philosophy is beyond tradition, crafted to perfection'
item.description: Fatal Fury publisher and Neo Geo arcade system creator SNK has announced its investment in a newly established game development studio founded by Tekken creator Katsuhiro Harada.

item.title: Rivian is rolling out its AI-powered voice assistant
item.description: It will be available on all Rivian Gen 1 and Gen 2 vehicles, as well as on the R2 when it launches.

item.title: Poppi cofounder Allison Ellsworth says you have to sacrifice work-life balance to succeed
item.description: The cofounder and her husband sold Poppi to Pepsi for $2 billion last year—now they’re navigating life as centimillionaires. Prebiotic soda brand Poppi has come a long way since it first appeared on Shark Tank under its original name, “Mother Beverage,” in 2018.

item.title: Grâce à cette offre, cet écran PC gaming LG 24″ 144 Hz tombe à moins de 80 €, difficile de faire mieux
item.description: En allant sur materiel.net vous pouvez commander l'écran LG UltraGear 24G411A-B en promo pour 79,95 euros au lieu de 109,99 euros sur le site officiel.

item.title: 'Get a PlayStation 5 today to be ready for when Grand Theft Auto 6 launches' — GTA 6 marketing has seemingly kicked off as Sony urges PS4 users to finally upgrade to the PS5
item.description: PlayStation 4 users who have wishlisted Grand Theft Auto 6 have started receiving messages urging them to upgrade to a PlayStation 5, suggesting marketing for the game has officially begun.

item.title: Hantavirus Conspiracy Theories Are Already Spreading Online
item.description: From claims of an Israeli false flag to efforts to sell ivermectin, influencers and grifters are using lessons learned from Covid-19 to push their baseless conspiracy theories.

item.title: Google’s Aluminium OS revealed in 16-minute leaked video
item.description: Aluminium OS, Google's upcoming version of Android for PC, may have just leaked a few hours before Google's Android Show presentation. As Android Authority reports, leaker Mystic Leaks shared a 16-minute video on their Telegram channel that appears to show a lengthy hands-on demo of the new operating system. After a loading screen featuring the […]

item.title: AI is a leadership problem, not a technology problem
item.description: The AI implementation gap is a lack of connection between activity and business performance. Most of the executive teams I work with have been investing in AI for a few years. The ones who are frustrated are not the skeptics. They are the believers whose programs have not connected to the P&L. They have the pilots, the internal momentum, the board slide showing everything in flight. What they do not have is a clear line between that activity and business performance, and at this point in the AI cycle, that gap is no longer acceptable....

item.title: Waymo issues recall to deal with a flooding problem
item.description: Waymo has issued a software recall that makes its robotaxis more cautious around flooded areas. A "final remedy" is in the works.

item.title: Message RCS : tout comprendre au remplaçant du SMS
item.description: Les messages RCS (Rich Communication Services) sont vus comme l'avenir du simple protocole SMS/MMS. Mais qu'est-ce vraiment que cette technologie fortement mise en avant par Google et ses partenaires ?

item.title: Grow your collection with this discounted Magic: The Gathering Edge of Eternities - Play Booster Box
item.description: As of May 12, get 22% off the Magic: The Gathering Edge of Eternities - Play Booster Box.

item.title: Compatible Dolby Atmos et DTS:X, cette barre de son LG 5.1.3 avec enceintes arrière chute sous les 400 €
item.description: Avec son caisson de basses et ses deux enceintes arrière, la barre de son LG S80TR, configurée en 5.1.3, promet une belle spatialisation et une immersion renforcée. Actuellement, Ubaldi propose cet ensemble à 381 euros au lieu de 449 euros.

item.title: How enterprises can safely scale agentic AI
item.description: As AI takes action, enterprises must embed governance to balance speed with control.

item.title: OpenAI reveals Daybreak, its attempt to topple Anthropic Mythos
item.description: Daybreak looks to rival Anthropic's Mythos as a high-severity vulnerability detection tool, while also securing software from the start.

item.title: There’s an internet choke point in the Middle East — is the solution in the North Pole?
item.description: The vast majority of the world's data - emails, financial transactions, the internet - is carried by fiber optic cables that run along the ocean floor and converge at a few narrow choke points. Periodically, policymakers will release reports noting that this arrangement seems risky, but these routes are the shortest, often in use since […]

item.title: Amazon's Memorial Day favorites are already on sale — 50% off Bissell, Apple, Dyson, Ninja, and more
item.description: While we wait for Memorial Day, Amazon already has its best-sellers on sale, with up to 50% off top brands like Bissell, Apple, Dyson, Ninja, and more.

item.title: Best Western Hotels warns customers reservation data may have been spilled in breach
item.description: Unnamed attackers stole data on an undisclosed number of Best Western customers, meaning phishing emails could be on the way.

item.title: Amazon rolls out its new 30-minute delivery option in a number of cities across the US
item.description: Amazon Now is coming to "dozens" of locations in 2026.

item.title: You don't need to wait until Prime Day to score up to 40% off these Amazon Devices — I've picked the 20 best deals from £23.99
item.description: Amazon isn't waiting until Prime Day to discount some of its best-selling devices, so I've picked out the 20 top deals that are worth buying now.
